name: docx_create
description: Create a new document from Markdown (headings, lists, tables, emphasis) or a structured spec with explicit styles and sections. Returns a doc_id for subsequent edits; output passes the same validation gate as every edit. Provide exactly one of content_md or spec.

content_md.description: Markdown content for the new document. Mutually exclusive with spec.

spec.description: Structured document spec with explicit styles and sections. Mutually exclusive with content_md.
